tasks.subject: Task 1: 마커 파서 + 목표 날짜 계산 (순수 함수)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** recurringCopy.ts에 위치 마커 파서·반복 종류 판별·목표 절대 날짜 계산 순수 함수를 추가(additive, green).

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/editor/sendListItem/recurringCopy.ts
- Test: app/tests/unit/editor/recurringCopy.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- parsePrefix tokenizes 25*(수)/25(수)*/25(수)^2/25(수)
- parsePrefix null for no day prefix (label * ignored)
- recurrenceFromParse monthly/weekly/everyNWeeks/null, monthly priority
- computeTargetDate monthly(+1mo)/weekly(+7)/everyNWeeks(+7N)

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/recurringCopy.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/sendListItem/recurringCopy.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/recurringCopy.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/recurringCopy.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parsePrefix tokenizes all 4 forms", "parsePrefix null for no day prefix", "recurrenceFromParse monthly-priority", "computeTargetDate monthly/weekly/everyNWeeks correct", "existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: 반복 복제본 빌더 (buildRecurredLiJson)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 목표 날짜로 prefix(일+요일) 재작성 + 마커 원위치 보존하는 buildRecurredLiJson 추가(additive, green).

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/editor/sendListItem/recurringCopy.ts
- Test: app/tests/unit/editor/recurringCopy.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- monthly 25*(수)+{2026,6,25}→25*(<wd>)
- weekly 25(수)*+{2026,6,1}→1(<wd>)*
- everyNWeeks 25(수)^2+{2026,6,8}→8(<wd>)^2
- no day prefix unchanged; input not mutated

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/recurringCopy.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/sendListItem/recurringCopy.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/recurringCopy.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/recurringCopy.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["monthly marker preserved + weekday recalc", "weekly marker preserved + day/weekday recalc", "everyNWeeks ^N preserved", "no day prefix unchanged", "input not mutated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: transferListItem 배선 + 옛 substring 경로 제거
tasks.description:
**Goal:** transferListItem.ts를 위치 마커 기반으로 교체(목표 월 섹션 삽입 + 종류별 토스트), recurringCopy.ts 옛 export 제거 + planMonthInsert/MonthInsertPlan 리네임.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/editor/sendListItem/transferListItem.ts
- Modify: app/src/lib/editor/sendListItem/recurringCopy.ts
- Test: app/tests/unit/editor/recurringCopy.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 25*(수)→다음달 + 토스트; 25(수)*→+7일 월섹션 + 토스트; 25(수)^2→+14일 월섹션 + 토스트
- 마커없음/라벨* → '보냈습니다.'만
- containsRecurringMarker/buildNextMonthLiJson/RECURRING_MARKER 제거, planMonthInsert/MonthInsertPlan 리네임
- npm run check 타입 0

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/recurringCopy.test.ts && npm run check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/sendListItem/transferListItem.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/sendListItem/recurringCopy.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/recurringCopy.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/recurringCopy.test.ts && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["monthly insert + toast", "weekly insert + toast", "everyNWeeks insert + toast", "non-marker = plain sent", "old symbols removed + renamed", "npm run check clean"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: autoWeekday가 25*(수) 형태 처리
tasks.description:
**Goal:** autoWeekday 정규식이 일 번호와 ( 사이 *(월간 마커)를 허용·보존하도록 확장.

**Files:**
- Modify: app/src/lib/schedule/autoWeekday.ts
- Test: app/tests/unit/schedule/autoWeekday.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 25*(틀린요일)→교정 + * 보존
- 25*(정답) idempotent
- 기존 케이스 불변 (autoWeekday + autoWeekdayPlugin 테스트 통과)

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/schedule/autoWeekday.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/schedule/autoWeekday.ts", "app/tests/unit/schedule/autoWeekday.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/schedule/autoWeekday.test.ts && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/autoWeekdayPlugin.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["25*(wrong) corrected + * preserved", "25*(correct) idempotent", "existing cases unchanged"]}
```
